title: Child LifeSG Credits
text:
Child LifeSG Credits - SupportGoWhere
Child LifeSG Credits
Share link
Provides broad-based support for Singaporean families with children.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
$500 Child LifeSG Credits for every Singapore Citizen child aged 0 to 12
Disbursed to eligible child's CDA trustee via the LifeSG mobile app
Can be used to defray household expenses
Collapse all sections
About this support

$500 Child LifeSG Credits disbursed to the Child Development Account (CDA) trustee of the child via the LifeSG mobile app 

Can be used at merchants that accept payments using PayNow UEN QR or NETS QR

Disbursement timeline:




	

Child's birth year

	

Eligibility assessment date*

	

Disbursement timeline




For 2025 Child LifeSG Credits

	

Between 2013 and 2024

	

1 June 2025

	

Week of 7 July 2025




2025

	

1 March 2026

	

From 8 April 2026




For 2026 Child LifeSG Credits

	

Between 2014 and 2025

	

1 June 2026

	

July 2026




2026

	

1 March 2027

	

April 2027




* The credits are disbursed to the eligible child’s CDA trustee in MSF’s records as of the eligibility assessment date. To check CDA trustee information, please access the Family View service on Parent Portal Services.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen

2025 Child LifeSG Credits: Aged 0 to 12 in 2025 (born from 1 January 2013 to 31 December 2025)

2026 Child LifeSG Credits: Aged 0 to 12 in 2026 (born from 1 January 2014 to 31 December 2026)




How to apply?

No application needed

Where can I find help?

View more details

Terms and conditions updated as of 7 April 2026

Baby Bonus and Large Families Scheme hotline: 1800 111 2222

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 19 May 2026
